summary: Completed testing of SciPost Pairwise gap charts feature. Found critical frontend rendering issue preventing gap charts from displaying despite backend providing correct data.

ui_bugs.issue: Gap charts not rendering despite backend providing correct by_gap data structure
ui_bugs.details: Backend APIs return proper gap data structure with small/medium/large categories and rates, but React component hasGapData condition evaluates to false

integration_issues.issue: aggregateGapStats function may not be processing backend data correctly or React state not updating

passed_tests: Navigation between SciPost Abstract and Extract modes works correctly
SciPost Pairwise sections load and display other data (status, overall majority, performance by model, agreement by dimension)
Backend APIs provide correct gap data structure for both abstract and extract modes
No JavaScript errors or crashes in UI
All other chart sections render properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix gap chart rendering logic in SciPostPairwiseSection component. The aggregateGapStats function or hasGapData condition is not working correctly despite backend providing proper by_gap data structure. Debug React component state and ensure gap charts display when data is available.
